title: Suno AI Cheat Sheet
description: Essential commands for everyday use of Suno AI.

commands.description: Provides a concise summary of the given text.
commands.scenario: When you need to quickly understand a long article.

commands.description: Gives a simple explanation of a complex concept.
commands.scenario: When you encounter a difficult topic.

commands.description: Simplifies complex text for better understanding.
commands.scenario: When an email or document is too technical.

commands.command: Generate ideas for a blog post
commands.description: Provides creative ideas for writing a blog post.
commands.scenario: When you're stuck on what to write about next.

commands.description: Translates the given text into French.
commands.scenario: When you need to communicate with French speakers.

commands.command: Create a to-do list from this text
commands.description: Extracts actionable items from a block of text.
commands.scenario: When you need to organize tasks from meeting notes.

commands.command: Convert this list into a paragraph
commands.description: Turns a list of points into a coherent paragraph.
commands.scenario: When you need to present bullet points as prose.

commands.description: Creates a professional email reply based on context.
commands.scenario: When you need help responding to an email.

commands.description: Condenses information into three key points.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick overview of a document.

commands.description: Provides a unique idea for a story.
commands.scenario: When you're brainstorming for a new story.

commands.command: Find research papers on this topic
commands.description: Lists relevant academic papers for a given topic.
commands.scenario: When conducting research for a project.

commands.command: Create a summary for social media
commands.description: Generates a short, engaging summary for social media.
commands.scenario: When you need to post about an article or event.

commands.description: Breaks down the humor in a joke for better understanding.
commands.scenario: When you don't get a joke but want to understand it.

commands.command: List pros and cons of this decision
commands.description: Provides a balanced view of the advantages and disadvantages.
commands.scenario: When evaluating a decision or choice.

commands.command: Create a mind map from this text
commands.description: Visualizes information in a mind map format.
commands.scenario: When you need to organize ideas visually.

commands.command: Generate song lyrics in the style of [Artist/Genre]
commands.description: Create custom lyrics by specifying a particular musical era, artist, or genre to guide the AI's rhythmic structure.
Use specific descriptors like 'Lo-fi', 'Cinematic', or '80s Synthwave' within the style box to override default generic outputs.
Insert tags like [Intro], [Chorus], [Bridge], or [Outro] within lyrics to control the song's arrangement and flow.
Use the 'Extend' feature to build upon an existing generation, allowing for longer songs and complex transitions.

commands.command: Create a mashup of [Genre A] and [Genre B]
commands.description: Combine two contrasting musical styles in the style prompt to discover unique, hybrid sonic textures.
Specify vocal characteristics like [Female Vocals], [Deep Male Voice], [Raspy], or [High-pitched] within brackets to control the singer's tone.
Insert [Instrumental Solo], [Drum Break], or [Piano Interlude] between lyric blocks to prevent the AI from singing through intended musical passages.
Enhance the mood by adding texture keywords like 'Lo-fi', 'Reverb-heavy', 'Cinematic', or 'Live Recording' to the Style prompt.
Control energy levels by using tags like [Build-up], [Drop], or [Outro] to guide the song's structural progression.
Add parenthetical text like (Ooh-ooh) or (Yeah!) within the lyrics to trigger background vocals and spontaneous ad-libs.
